---
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    anchor-location: none
    page-layout: full
echo: false
message: false
warning: false
---

```{=html}
<main class="ed">

<!-- Hero -->
<section class="l-hero">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-hero-row">
      <div>
        <a class="l-status" role="status" aria-live="polite"
           href="https://www.oregon.gov/ode/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"
           aria-label="Currently employed at the Oregon Department of Education">
          <span class="l-status-mark" aria-hidden="true">
            <!-- Placeholder ODE seal. Replace with /images/ode-logo.png when
                 you've grabbed the official artwork from oregon.gov/ode -->
            <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="23" fill="#0b2545"/>
              <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#d4af37" stroke-width="0.8"/>
              <text x="24" y="29.5" text-anchor="middle"
                    font-family="Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif"
                    font-weight="700" font-size="13.5" fill="#ffffff"
                    letter-spacing="0.5">ODE</text>
            </svg>
          </span>
          <span class="l-status-body">
            <span class="l-status-eyebrow">Currently engaged</span>
            <strong class="l-status-org">Oregon Department of Education</strong>
            <span class="l-status-role">Business Intelligence Analyst · Since Dec 8, 2025</span>
          </span>
          <span class="l-status-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
        </a>
        <p class="l-eyebrow">Epsilon Labs</p>
        <h1>Decision-grade statistics, scoped to ship.</h1>
        <p class="l-lede">
          I help teams design experiments, build predictive models, and
          stand up the analytics behind real decisions. Documentation
          that survives an audit. Tooling your team can keep using.
        </p>
        <div class="l-cta-row">
          <a href="mailto:briancervantesalvarez@gmail.com" class="l-btn">Email me</a>
          <a href="/content/services/" class="l-btn l-btn--ghost">Services</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img src="/images/profile2.jpg" alt="Brian Cervantes Alvarez"
           class="l-portrait" loading="eager">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Services preview -->
<section class="l-section first" id="services">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">What I do</p>
    <div class="l-row">
      <h2>Four practice areas.</h2>
      <a href="/content/services/">All services →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="l-cols">
      <div>
        <h3>Statistical analysis &amp; modeling</h3>
        <p>Experimental design, hypothesis testing, regression, and Bayesian inference for questions that deserve careful answers.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Predictive modeling &amp; ML</h3>
        <p>Classification, forecasting, and risk scoring with proper validation. Models built to hold up under audit.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Interactive analytics</h3>
        <p>R Shiny, Quarto, and lightweight web tools that turn an analysis into a self-service decision aid.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Reproducible reporting</h3>
        <p>R, Python, and SQL pipelines that document assumptions, version cleanly, and rerun reliably.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Selected work -->
<section class="l-section" id="work">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Recent work</p>
    <div class="l-row">
      <h2>Selected projects.</h2>
      <a href="/content/projects/">All projects →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="l-grid">
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/united-kingdom-car-accident-shiny-app/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/images/ukcaraccident.webp" alt="UK Car Accident Shiny App">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Interactive analytics</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">UK Traffic Accident Trends</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            An interactive dashboard for exploring incident patterns —
            filters, dynamic views, defaults that surface signal first.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/wine-multivariate-statistical-analysis/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/images/redwhite.jpeg" alt="Wine Multivariate Analysis">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Statistical modeling</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Multivariate Analysis: Wine Quality</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            PCA and supervised models with diagnostics to separate signal
            from noise across correlated chemical features.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/yelp-business-reviews-shiny-app/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/images/yelpburst.svg" alt="Yelp Business Reviews Shiny App">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Geospatial analytics</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Yelp Business Reviews</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            A spatial review explorer with map-linked filters, density
            layers, and per-business summaries.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Writing -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Writing</p>
    <div class="l-row">
      <h2>From the blog.</h2>
      <a href="/content/blog/">All posts →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="l-grid">
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/blog/interactive-teaching-with-webr/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/images/webr.png" alt="Interactive Teaching with webR">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Teaching · webR</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Interactive Teaching with webR</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            Browser-native, no-install R lessons built with Quarto and
            webR so students run code inline and learn by doing.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- How I work -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">How I work</p>
    <h2>Four things you can expect.</h2>
    <div class="l-cols">
      <div>
        <h3>Decision-focused</h3>
        <p>Every analysis answers <em>what should we do next</em> — not just <em>what happened</em>.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Explainable</h3>
        <p>Validated with proper holdout and cross-validation. I default to interpretable methods so stakeholders can trust the answer.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Reproducible</h3>
        <p>Auditable R, Python, and SQL with documented assumptions and reruns that produce the same numbers next quarter.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Production-minded</h3>
        <p>I ship lightweight tools, instrument usage, and iterate so the work compounds instead of fading.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Contact -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-contact" id="contact">
      <p class="l-eyebrow">Let's talk</p>
      <h2>Have a question worth answering carefully?</h2>
      <p>Send the question, the data you have, and when you need the answer. I'll reply within two business days with next steps — or a referral if I'm not the right fit.</p>
      <div class="l-cta-row" style="justify-content:center;">
        <a class="l-btn" href="mailto:briancervantesalvarez@gmail.com">Email me</a>
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="/content/services/">See services</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="l-resume">
      <p><strong>Want the full background?</strong> Read the about page or grab the CV.</p>
      <div class="l-cta-row" style="margin:0;">
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="/content/about/">About</a>
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="/documents/resume/bca-resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">CV (PDF)</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</main>
```
